articles.title: Sexual violence part of 'everyday life' in parts of Sudan, charity says
articles.summary: Victims describe how they have been targeted while carrying out everyday activities.

articles.title: Kid Rock sparks US Army probe after helicopter flyby at his mansion
articles.summary: The country rock artist posted footage on Saturday of himself saluting the aircraft from his outdoor pool.
